user.title: Connect to HestiaClaw
user.description: Enter the URL of your HestiaClaw instance. If you are running the HestiaClaw addon, this is usually auto-configured for you. The voice token is only required for remote or non-addon installs.

data.token: Voice Token (leave empty if not set)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to HestiaClaw. Make sure the add-on is running and the URL is correct.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid voice token. Check the token against the add-on logs.
